untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking 'Days to Expiration' (DTE) and comparing implied volatility (IV) to historical average, which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal also requires dynamic threshold values [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] for DTE and IV moves that are not specified in the source text. Options-specific metrics (implied volatility, time to expiration, IV term structure) are not present in the allowed indicators, which are equity price action focused.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally about options volatility dynamics and time decay, which cannot be accurately represented using only equity price action indicators (RSI, ATR, MACD, etc.). The core logic depends on: (1) DTE tracking, (2) Implied Volatility levels, and (3) IV term structure stability—none of which are available. To implement this signal properly, indicators like 'days_to_expiration', 'implied_volatility', and 'realized_volatility' would be required.
